text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
H-hold up... I appreciate the thought, but there's
no need to bend over backwards over it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm not used to having the dazzling main
character come in and try to lift me up...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You sure? There are a lot of people who wanna
celebrate your birthday with you, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, even I've noticed your impressive track
record. You always place well in every race you
enter.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
'Course I did. Just between you and me, I think
there's a good chance your future's gonna be
bright.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? Maybe you'll be the most popular
Umamusume around real soon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The most popular Umamusume... C'mon, no need
for jokes like that. Even if that were possible, it'd
probably take forever.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with taking your time. So
hey, lemme hear it! Shout out loud that one day,
you'll surpass me in popularity.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, fine... I'll beat you one day, Teio! I-in three
years!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, make that thirty years! I've only got a
slim chance, but I'll keep at it!
